proven.claim: PROVEN: totalViolations >= 0 — sum of non-negative violations.length values
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P6
; LINE: 439
; PROVEN: totalViolations >= 0 — sum of non-negative violations.length values
(declare-const violations_0 Int)   ; c.violations.length for an arbitrary contract
(declare-const total_violations Int)
; Code transition: violations.length is an array length — non-negative
(assert (>= violations_0 0))
; Code transition: totalViolations initialized to 0, then += c.violations.length each iteration
(assert (= total_violations violations_0))
; Negated property: total_violations < 0
(assert (< total_violations 0))
(check-sat)
